title: 🦞 OpenClaw Part 2: Adding Telegram & Slack Channels ... - YouTube
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

OpenClaw Part 2: Adding Telegram & Slack Channels (WhatsApp & Discord Done)
Code & Cloud
9610 subscribers
2 likes
32 views
17 Feb 2026
Welcome back to the channel! In this comprehensive tutorial, I'll walk you through the entire process of connecting Telegram and Slack to OpenClaw, enabling you to control your computer remotely through these popular messaging platforms. Building on our previous videos where we set up OpenClaw on Windows and configured WhatsApp and Discord channels, today we're adding two more powerful communication channels to your automation toolkit.

What You'll Learn:

How to create and configure Telegram bots from scratch

Setting up Slack apps with proper permissions and scopes

Configuring Socket Mode and Event Subscriptions in Slack

Testing both channels with real-world tasks (file creation, browser automation)

Monitoring logs and chat history in OpenClaw

Controlling your computer from mobile devices

Why OpenClaw Matters: OpenClaw is a powerful open-source automation gateway that bridges the gap between your messaging apps and your computer. Think of it as your personal AI assistant that lives in your chat applications and can execute commands, manage files, browse the web, and perform complex tasks on your behalf. Whether you're a developer who wants to trigger builds from your phone or just someone who loves automating repetitive tasks, OpenClaw provides the infrastructure to make it happen.

Telegram Setup Overview: We start by downloading the Telegram Desktop client and creating a bot through BotFather. You'll learn how to get your access token, configure the OpenClaw JSON file, and pair your bot. We test everything with real commands – creating folders, generating text files, and even browser automation. The best part? Everything works seamlessly from the mobile app too, allowing true remote control from anywhere.

Slack Setup Overview: Slack integration requires more configuration but is equally powerful. We create a Slack app from scratch, enable Socket Mode, and carefully set up all required OAuth scopes including chat:write, channels:history, im:read, and more. Event subscriptions are configured to capture messages, and we install the app to your workspace. After adding both app token and bot token to OpenClaw, we test with browser automation and file management tasks.

Unified Command Center: One of OpenClaw's coolest features is unified message handling. All your conversations across Telegram, Slack, WhatsApp, and Discord appear in the OpenClaw web interface. You can also explore detailed logs, filter by channel, and troubleshoot any issues that arise.


Timeline:

0:00 - Introduction and what we'll cover today
0:45 - Setting up Telegram desktop client
2:15 - Creating a Telegram bot and getting access token
4:30 - Configuring Telegram channel in OpenClaw
6:00 - Testing Telegram bot with file creation task
8:15 - Testing Telegram from mobile app
9:30 - Setting up Slack app from scratch
11:45 - Enabling Socket Mode and creating app token
13:30 - Configuring OAuth scopes for Slack bot
15:45 - Setting up Event Subscriptions
18:00 - Installing Slack app to workspace
19:30 - Connecting Slack channel in OpenClaw
21:15 - Testing Slack bot with browser automation

title: 🦞 Build Cross-Platform AI Agents with OpenClaw - CodeWithYoha
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# Build Cross-Platform AI Agents with OpenClaw: WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord. Build Cross-Platform AI Agents with OpenClaw: WhatsApp, Telegram, Discord. It connects Large Language Models (LLMs) with popular communication channels like WhatsApp, Telegram, and Discord, allowing you to manage your AI's core logic (Skills) once and route it everywhere. This guide will walk you through setting up, configuring, and deploying your own multi-platform AI assistant using the official OpenClaw CLI. OpenClaw handles the complexity of the Telegram Bot API for you. Building cross-platform AI agents no longer requires managing three different codebases in Python or Go. With **OpenClaw**, you can leverage a powerful Node.js-based gateway to unify your communication channels under a single intelligent core. By abstracting platforms into **Channels** and logic into **Skills**, OpenClaw lets you focus on what matters: the user experience and the intelligence of your agent. Whether you're building a personal assistant for WhatsApp or a community moderator for Discord, OpenClaw provides the most efficient path to deployment.

title: 🦞 From Chat App to AI Powerhouse: Telegram + OpenClaw - Medium
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

In this guide, we’ll walk through how to install OpenClaw on macOS and connect it to Telegram step by step. OpenClaw is a self-hosted AI assistant that runs locally on your machine while connecting to messaging platforms like Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, and more. Before connecting OpenClaw to Telegram, we first need to install it locally. After entering your API key, OpenClaw verifies it and automatically configures a default model. ## Step 5: Connect OpenClaw to Telegram. After configuring your model, OpenClaw will ask you to select a chat channel. After selecting **Telegram (Bot API)** as your channel, OpenClaw will prompt you to enter your Telegram bot token. After entering your Telegram bot token, OpenClaw finalizes the channel configuration. After completing the configuration, OpenClaw installs and starts the **Gateway service**. Messages sent to your Telegram bot are routed through the OpenClaw Gateway, processed by your selected model, and returned in real time.

title: 🦞 openclaw-cron | Skills Marketplace - LobeHub
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

OpenClaw Cron Manager provides a safe CLI wrapper to create, list, run, enable/disable and manage OpenClaw cron jobs without editing configuration files. It supports cron expressions (5-field), interval scheduling (--every 10m, 1h, 1d), one-time runs (--at +20m or ISO timestamps), timezone handling (--tz), job lifecycle options (delete-after-run, enable/disable), immediate test runs, and announcement integrations (channels like Telegram). `Curl https://lobehub.com/skills/liuzln-openclaw-skills-openclaw-cron/skill.md, then follow the instructions to setup LobeHub Skills Marketplace and install the skill read the SKILL.md file in the installed directory, and follow its instructions to complete the task.`. Safe management of OpenClaw cron jobs without touching configuration files. ### List all cron jobs. `openclaw cron run <job-id>`. `openclaw cron disable <job-id>. openclaw cron enable <job-id>`. `openclaw cron run <job-id>`. `openclaw cron runs <job-id>`. `openclaw cron edit <job-id> --name "新名称". openclaw cron edit <job-id> --cron "0 10 * * *". openclaw cron edit <job-id> --disabled`. `openclaw cron disable <job-id>. openclaw cron enable <job-id>`. `openclaw cron rm <job-id>`.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Cron Jobs: Complete Command Reference with Examples
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# OpenClaw cron jobs: automate your AI agent while you sleep. * OpenClaw (previously known as Clawdbot and Moltbot) has built-in cron jobs that let your agent run tasks on a schedule without you being present. * What are OpenClaw cron jobs. ## What are OpenClaw cron jobs. Cron jobs are scheduled tasks that your OpenClaw agent executes automatically. An agent with cron jobs runs scheduled tasks at 7 AM, backs up files every hour, and sends weekly reports without manual triggering. Just tell your agent what you want scheduled and it will create the cron job for you. > "Create a cron job that runs every morning at 7 AM UTC. When a cron job runs in the main session, it has access to the full conversation history. For a complete walkthrough of building a morning briefing cron job, see OpenClaw Morning Briefing: 10-Minute Setup That Actually Works. Q: How many cron jobs can I run? * OpenClaw documentation on cron jobs.

title: 🦞 OpenClaw Cron Advanced 2026: Every Schedule Command Q&A
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

**About This Guide:** OpenClaw's cron system is the Gateway's built-in scheduler — it persists jobs, wakes agents at the right time, and can deliver output back to your chat. ## `openclaw cron add`: Creating Jobs. ## `openclaw cron edit`: Updating Jobs. `openclaw cron run`  triggers a job immediately. `openclaw cron list` shows all jobs in your store with their IDs, schedules, enabled status, and last/next run times. ### Q How do I view a cron job's run history? `openclaw cron runs` shows the execution history for a specific job. `openclaw system event` sends an immediate system event to the main agent session without creating a persistent cron job. * → Run `openclaw cron list` to verify job is enabled. * → Use `openclaw cron run`  to manually trigger and reset. openclaw cron add --name "..." --every 30m --session isolated --message "..." --announce. ### Keep Your Cron Jobs Running 24/7 with VPN07. OpenClaw cron jobs run around the clock — your VPN should too.
